description: Assistant Manager hooks - session memory persistence and user communication
_note: Hook data is passed via stdin as JSON. Scripts read from stdin, not env vars.

SessionStart._description: Load session memory and context at startup

UserPromptSubmit._description: DECOUPLE-BLOCKED ai-maestro#36 (hook-split pending): this hook's api-part — POST to /api/sessions/me/user-input on every prompt — must move to a frozen CLI once the session user-input verb is exposed/deployed; until then the hook posts directly. It feeds the AI Maestro user-presence API so amama-presence-tracker can compute idle time. Fail-soft: never blocks prompt submission.

Stop._description: Blocks exit until all coordination work is complete
